settings.heading: Support built around your product
settings.copy: Find the right file, guide, compatibility answer, or direct help in one place.
settings.support_note: Setup help, troubleshooting, compatibility, and direct support stay tied to the product you own or the one you are choosing.

settings.heading: Start where the answer is most likely
settings.copy: Downloads, manuals, compatibility, troubleshooting, and direct support are organized to get you there faster.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Drivers and utilities for the product you already have.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Quick-start guides, user manuals, and setup notes by product family.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.copy: Check the right device and workflow before you buy or set up.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.copy: Answer common questions before you go deeper.

settings.title: Troubleshooting
settings.copy: Use symptom-led help when a product is connected but not behaving as expected.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.copy: Reach support when the answer depends on your exact product, order, or setup.

settings.title: Shipping & returns
settings.copy: Review shipping, returns, and order guidance in one place.

settings.title: Warranty
settings.copy: Review coverage, claim expectations, and when support should be contacted first.

settings.heading: Keep deeper help close
settings.copy: Open firmware, long-form guides, decision help, or direct support without losing sight of the product or setup already in front of you.

settings.title: Firmware
settings.copy: Firmware updates and release notes matched to product and version.

settings.title: User guides
settings.copy: Long-form setup guides and best-practice guidance by workflow.

settings.title: Help me choose
settings.copy: Use guided product advice when you need to choose the right hub, dock, power, or accessory.

settings.title: Ticket submission
settings.copy: Send a direct support request when self-service is no longer enough.

settings.heading: Need direct help?
settings.copy: If the answer depends on your exact product, order, or deployment, move into contact or warranty guidance with the right details in place.
